text: Fantastic wood-fired pizza and friendly staff. The crust had a beautiful char and the seasonal salad was so fresh. We’ll be back.
Loved the cozy atmosphere and the craft cocktails. House-made pasta was al dente. Service was a bit slow, but the team was gracious.
Food tasted great but we waited 40 minutes for a table. The server seemed overwhelmed. Worth it for the pasta, but the wait was tough.
Incredible farm-to-table flavors. The charcuterie board and wood fired pizza were outstanding. Quick service and warm hospitality.
Over-salted risotto and our drinks took forever. Cozy room, but the kitchen felt backed up. Manager apologized.
Best brunch in town! Fluffy eggs, crispy potatoes, and a bright mimosa. Friendly staff and great value.
Great value tasting menu. Farm to table vibe with seasonal vegetables shining. Cocktail was balanced and delicious.
Waited an hour past our reservation and the steak was cold. Service missed the mark tonight.
House made pasta melted in my mouth. Cozy atmosphere, attentive service, and a perfect tiramisu. New favorite spot.
Loved the wood-fired crust and the farm-to-table story. A tad pricey, but quality ingredients show.
Tasty pizza but the music was too loud and we couldn’t hear our server. Otherwise a nice night.
Exceptional service and a thoughtful seasonal menu. Craft cocktail list is creative. We felt welcomed.
